Khandoba Temple, Beed is a Hindu temple located in the town of Beed, in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kankaleshwar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kankaleshwar Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kankaleshwar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Aurangabad Airport (105 km) and the nearest railway station is Aurangabad Railway Station (110 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kankaleshwar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kankaleshwar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kankaleshwar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kankaleshwar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kankaleshwar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Beed, Khandoba Temple, Beed.
